name: 道の駅 おおすみ弥五郎伝説の里
nameEn: Michi-no-Eki Osumi Yagoro Densetsu no Sato
desc: 高さ15mの「弥五郎どん」銅像が目印の道の駅。約20haの敷地に遊具施設・温泉・物産館・レストランを備え、黒豚「やごろう豚」が名物。
descEn: Marked by a 15m bronze statue of the legendary giant Yagoro-don. Its roughly 20-hectare grounds include play equipment, a hot spring, a market, and a restaurant, with Yagoro pork a local specialty.

name: 道の駅 たからべ
desc: 宮崎県境の県道2号沿いにある道の駅。気温の寒暖差と清らかな水で育った地元産のお米が名物。
descEn: Along Prefectural Route 2 near the Miyazaki border. Known for locally grown rice, nurtured by the area's temperature swings and clean water.

name: 道の駅 すえよし
desc: 国道10号沿い、大隅地方の玄関口にある木造の道の駅。地産地消のランチバイキングやゆず加工品が人気。
descEn: A wooden roadside station along Route 10, at the gateway to the Osumi region. Popular for a locally sourced lunch buffet and yuzu citrus products.
